sourceTitle: Artificial Intelligence | Office of Ethics, Risk, and Compliance Services
evidenceSnippetOriginal: The Office of Ethics, Risk and Compliance is providing resources and guidance about how to use artificial intelligence (AI), specifically generative AI, in an ethical and appropriate manner. This page will help guide you to available tools with a focus on privacy and compliance with existing laws and policies.
evidenceLocator: Main body text of the AI landing page
